name: bit-field

en.when_to_use: Use it to render a set of bit-field descriptions as a pixel-aligned SVG register, protocol-header, or instruction-encoding bit-field diagram instead of drawing one by hand, because native implementations fail at bit counting, field-boundary alignment, multiple lanes (32/64-bit wrapping), and attribute labels. It is the static bit-field companion to wavedrom in the catalog: bit-field draws a register's static bit layout, while wavedrom draws signal timing waveforms; not for timing waveforms or circuits.
en.why_valuable: Hand-drawn bit-field SVG from AI will miscount bits, misalign boundaries, and wrap lanes unreliably. bit-field consumes a field-description array, deterministically emits a diagram with every bit boundary aligned and field names and attributes attached, then onml.stringify converts it to an SVG string.

data_in.note: fields are consumed from low to high bit (LSB->MSB); an anonymous { bits: N } is a reserved/gap segment. The sum of all segment bits should equal options.bits (default 32). render returns an onml JsonML array, which must then pass through onml.stringify (=onml.s) to become an SVG string--use both packages together.

fields.name?: string -- field name; none by default (anonymous gap segment)
fields.attr?: string | string[] | number -- attribute label (such as 'RO'/'RW'); none by default; arrays render on multiple lines
fields.type?: number -- color category (2..7 map to different fills); uncolored by default

options?.lanes?: number -- number of rectangular lane rows, default 2
options?.vspace?: number -- vertical pixel height per lane, default 80

spec.note: SVG height is about vspace*lanes, and width grows with hspace/bit count. Give the carrier an explicit height (default lanes=2 and vspace=80 -> about 200px) with two-way scrolling; rule 3 prohibits vh/percentage height.

when_to_use: 把一组 bit 字段描述渲成像素对齐的寄存器/协议头/指令编码位域图 SVG 时用它,而非手绘——原生在 bit 计数、字段边界对齐、多 lane(32/64 位换行)与属性标注上失败。它是目录里 wavedrom 的静态位域搭档:bit-field 画寄存器的静态 bit 布局,wavedrom 画信号时序波形;非做时序波形或电路。
why_valuable: AI 手绘位域 SVG 会数错 bit、错位边界、无法可靠换行 lane。bit-field 吃一个字段描述数组,确定性输出每条 bit 边界都对齐、带字段名/属性的位域图,再由 onml.stringify 转成 SVG 字符串。

data_in.note: fields 按从低位到高位(LSB→MSB)顺序消费;匿名 { bits: N }=保留/空隙段;各段 bits 之和应等于 options.bits(默认 32)。render 返回 onml JsonML 数组,必须再经 onml.stringify(=onml.s)才成 SVG 字符串——两个包一起用。

fields.bits: number —— 该字段占的位宽(必填)
fields.name?: string —— 字段名,默认无(匿名空隙段)
fields.attr?: string | string[] | number —— 属性标注(如 'RO'/'RW'),默认无;数组则多行
fields.type?: number —— 着色类别(2..7 对应不同填充),默认无色
fields.rotate?: number —— 字段名旋转角度,默认 0

options?.lanes?: number —— 矩形 lane 行数,默认 2
options?.vspace?: number —— 每 lane 垂直像素高,默认 80
options?.compact?: boolean —— 紧凑格式,默认 false

spec.note: SVG 高约 vspace×lanes,宽随 hspace/位数增长;承载区给显式高(默认 lanes=2、vspace=80→~200px)并双向滚动,禁 vh/百分比高(铁律 3)。

example._why: 字段数组语义直白,minimal 取官方 README 例(含匿名空隙段 + type 着色 + attr)。

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested:纯 JS SVG 字符串,理论可用;lib/render 仅用 tspan/onml,Node deps(fs-extra/yargs)只在 CLI,未真机验证 +esm 树是否干净
carriers.widget: supported:render 纯函数生成 onml→stringify SVG 写入 shadow host;无 CSS/head/font/worker 注入
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + SVG 字符串,无 worker/wasm/uplink

isolation.evidence: API verified vs bit-field@1.9.0: +esm exports `{B as default, it as render}`;README 与 lib/render.js 一致:`render(reg, options)` 返回 onml JsonML,再 `onml.stringify(jsonml)` 得 `<svg...>`。onml@2.1.0 +esm exports 含 `{V as stringify, U as s}`(stringify 命名导出可用)。render 全局副作用 grep = 0(无 document.*/Worker/WebAssembly/appendChild),纯函数返回数组。字段/选项(bits/name/attr/type/hspace/vspace/lanes/compact/hflip/vflip 等)为 render.js 真实消费的键。headless 风格但产出可视 SVG→按 component 收,与同作者、同 onml 套路的目录条目 wavedrom 一致。
